title: MCP Server Mode
overview: Add browse --mcp mode that runs browse as an MCP server over stdio. Makes browse available to Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, and any MCP-compatible editor. Each command becomes an MCP tool with typed parameters.
scopeChallenge: No existing MCP code. MCP SDK handles JSON-RPC framing. Command handlers already take (command, args, bm) and return string — MCP adapter is a thin mapping layer. EXPANSION for comprehensive tool definitions and tests.

failureModes.risk: MCP SDK too large for bundling
failureModes.mitigation: Externalize with --external or verify bundle size
Group related commands as params on fewer tools (~40)
Catch disconnect, return error, attempt restart
Use tools/list as ready signal, 10s timeout

tasks.title: Define MCP tool schemas
tasks.description: Create src/mcp-tools.ts with tool definitions for all browse commands. One tool per command, typed JSON Schema params. Export getToolDefinitions() and mapToolCallToCommand().
acceptanceCriteria: Every registered command has a corresponding MCP tool
mapToolCallToCommand correctly maps params to args array
Tools with required params have required in schema
Invalid tool name throws clear error

tasks.title: Create MCP server module
tasks.description: Create src/mcp.ts using @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Launch browser, register tools/list and tools/call handlers, connect via StdioServerTransport. Route tool calls to existing command handlers.
acceptanceCriteria: startMcpServer() launches browser and connects to stdio
tools/list returns all tool definitions
tools/call dispatches to correct command handler
Errors return as content, not crash
SIGINT closes browser cleanly

tasks.title: Wire --mcp flag in CLI
tasks.description: Detect --mcp in process.argv before main(). Start MCP server instead of HTTP client. Add to help text.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --mcp starts MCP server
browse --mcp does NOT start HTTP server
--mcp appears in browse --help
Works in compiled binary

tasks.title: Add MCP SDK dependency and build integration
tasks.description: Install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Update esbuild config. Verify build and binary work.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build succeeds with MCP SDK
node dist/browse.cjs --mcp starts without import errors
Package size increase under 500KB
Existing commands still work

tasks.title: Documentation — SKILL.md, README, MCP config examples
tasks.description: Add MCP setup instructions for Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Claude Desktop. Update SKILL.md flags table and features-comparison.md.
acceptanceCriteria: README has MCP section with config examples
SKILL.md has --mcp in CLI flags
features-comparison.md shows YES for MCP

tasks.title: Integration tests for MCP server
tasks.description: Create test/mcp.test.ts. Spawn MCP server as child process, use MCP Client to send tool calls, verify responses. Test listing, execution, errors, shutdown.
acceptanceCriteria: All MCP protocol tests pass
Tool count matches registered commands
No orphan Chromium processes
Works with tsx and compiled binary

tasks.title: Snapshot tool returns structured refs
tasks.description: For browse_snapshot via MCP, return structured JSON refs alongside text content. Agents can parse refs programmatically instead of regex.
acceptanceCriteria: browse_snapshot via MCP returns text content + structured resource
Structured refs contain role and name per ref
Other commands return text only
CLI mode unaffected
